code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: MUST include <Reasoning> (brief analysis) and <Rating> (1-5) tags
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment based solely on the review text
    - Base rating on holistic satisfaction, not isolated phrases
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1★ (Very Negative):
    - Safety hazards overriding positive aspects
    - Fundamental failures despite promising concept
    - Premature failure (≤6mo) with functional impact
    - Negative updates about same product negate satisfaction
    - Multi-purchase failures regardless of duration

    2★ (Negative):
    - Core functionality needs frequent adjustments
    - Persistent frustration during regular use
    - Clearly inferior to alternatives in key features
    - Purchase regret with justification

    3★ (Neutral/Mixed):
    - Balanced pros/cons with usage limitations
    - Conditional recommendations ("works if...")
    - Adequate performance with clear compromises

    4★ (Positive):
    - Single functional flaw impacting core use
    - Requires break-in period for full functionality
    - Explicit star deduction ("4 because...")
    - Meeting expectations without enthusiasm
    - Brand comparisons with minor functional shortcomings
    - Positive tone lacking enthusiastic endorsement

    5★ (Very Positive):
    - Concise praise with 2+ functional benefits
    - Solves persistent problems through daily use
    - Explicit "still 5 stars" despite imperfections
    - Heavy usage validation ("Withstood 2yrs+")
    - Replacement purchases indicate satisfaction
    - Brief explicit praise without criticism
    - Practical benefits outweigh all functional flaws

    BOUNDARY CLARIFICATIONS:
    - Continuous use despite part replacements →5
    - Stated overall rating overrides component scores
    - Negative updates only →1 if same product
    - Brand comparisons without shortcomings →5
    - Aesthetic praise without function →4
    - Multi-aspect criticism with final endorsement →5
    - "Works as intended" + validation →5
</DynamicRules>
</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: "Second unit failed faster. Dangerous defects!"
<Reasoning>Multi-purchase safety failures →1</Reasoning>
<Rating>1</Rating>

Example 2:
Review: "This mattress gets 4 stars for comfort but 5 overall for features"
<Reasoning>Explicit overall rating overrides component score →5</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 3:
Review: "Village Candle equals Yankee but scent fades faster"
<Reasoning>Brand comparison with functional shortcoming →4</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 4:
Review: "Requires breaking in but then works perfectly"
<Reasoning>Initial effort needed reduces rating →4</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 5:
Review: "Magnets are perfect! Strong and right size"
<Reasoning>Brief explicit praise without criticism →5</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 6:
Review: "Good for light use but material feels cheap"
<Reasoning>Clear compromise reduces rating →3</Reasoning>
<Rating>3</Rating>

Example 7:
Review: "Weekly adjustments needed for basic function"
<Reasoning>Persistent maintenance →2</Reasoning>
<Rating>2</Rating>

Example 8:
Review: "UPDATE: Failed after 3mo. Do not recommend"
<Reasoning>Negative update negates initial satisfaction →1</Reasoning>
<Rating>1</Rating>

Example 9:
Review: "Absorbs well and dries fast. Does the job."
<Reasoning>Positive but lacks enthusiasm →4</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 10:
Review: "Pyrex lids wore out but containers remain daily drivers"
<Reasoning>Core functionality maintains satisfaction despite part replacement →5</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:
{"error_examples": "RULE COVERAGE:
  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: OK
  All categories covered.

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (39 total misclassified):
  gold 4 -> 5: 15
  gold 4 -> 3: 8
  gold 5 -> 4: 8
  gold 1 -> 2: 3
  gold 1 -> 5: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "I would have given this a five star rating had it fit the appliance it was purchased for. It didn't. With that being said, make sure you are positive of the model number of your ice tea maker before ordering and don't order based on how it "looks". H..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.33
  2. Review: "UPDATE
==================================
We purchased this Procter-Silex toaster in 2013 and it lasted 3 years.  We were okay with that.

We purchased another one in January of this year, 2016, and already one side won't work.  Less than 2 months is..."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 3] | Disagreement: 0.33
  3. Review: "It's a very solid bed that feels like it's going to hold up to just about anything. Assembly wasn't too difficult, though there were a couple of parts that had to be under some pressure to get the screw holes to line up just right. Also, when we firs..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "There are a few different things I look for in a bed frame in order for me to consider it a win in my book. These include ease of assembly, all parts being included, and the sturdiness of the frame once it is assembled. This bed frame met each and ev..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "I like my Star Wars characters. I have a Darth Vader mug already and now I have the Chewbacca. The cup is nice and I like that it has the sash detail on the front and back so you know immediately it is Chewie. The mug can hold 20 ounces. As with most..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "While this looks cool, it functionally is no good.  To grate cheese, you have to hold onto the top of the taco.  Because it is plastic, the two sides squeeze together when gripped. This, coupled with the slipperiness of the plastic, makes this thing ..."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [1, 2, 2] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "Made in the USA.  It's the only candles I'll buy since I've just read too much about what can be in foreign made candles.  Things like lead. (ugh)

Normally I buy Yankee candles but I found this Village Candle to be just as nice if not nicer.  The sc..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "My wife and I recently got talked into a camping weekend, and as neither of us has camped in decades, we wanted to do so in a bit of luxury.  I'm a rather large dude, and I've laid on enough beds that lost all of their air to know I wanted a good bed..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "I love my coffee/tea hot and my beer etc cold, and you won't find a classier way to accomplish either.  These elegant glasses allow you to see your beautiful beverages as well as savor them at whatever temp you like.  The only negative is that the gl..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "Grunds bathmat is 100% certified organic cotton  with the main section being long straight cotton fibers and it has three stripes of loops on each end. This fiber is not treated with bleach, formaldehyde,  or any other harmful toxic substances. This ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 39 errors, 13 borderline out of 80 examples."}
